summary:
Perfect! The fix is in place. Line 74 now correctly shows:
```rust
"    pub fn {}(&self) -> &{} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n",
```

The key change is the `&` before `{}` in the return type, making it `-> &Company` instead of `-> Company`.

## Summary

The bug was in `src/codegen.rs` in the `generate_getter` function. For `FieldType::Ref` types, the getter was returning an owned type (`Company`) instead of a reference (`&Company`), even though the function body was returning `&self.field`.

**The fix:** Changed line 74 from:
```rust
"    pub fn {}(&self) -> {} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n",
```
to:
```rust
"    pub fn {}(&self) -> &{} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n",
```

This ensures that reference-typed fields return references, maintaining proper Rust ownership semantics and enabling chained accessor patterns to work correctly.
